_comment: Species: Iron Bear (铁熊) from A Will Eternal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Iron Bear

canonical.appearance: Bear 4 m tall, fur iron-grey, hide repels spirit-steel, claws cut armor
canonical.size: 4 m adult, 6000 jin; ancient 10 m, 80000 jin
canonical.behavior: Territorial body-tempering beast; cultivates by absorbing metal-essence
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: No alchemy value — common beast with no condensed inner core
inner_dan_properties.canon_note: iron_bear — common beast, no condensed inner core

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
